body:
🟢 Full transparency — a SKR long I just closed: +14.5% (3x).

Yes, this screenshot is from another exchange (Hyperliquid) — I'll be straight with you. It closed green, BUT on small-caps like SKR the depth there is thin: slippage and rougher fills than I want.

So from here I keep execution on Bitunix — deeper books on these pairs, cleaner fills, tighter stops. No point fighting thin liquidity when a better venue exists.

Want to trade on the same exchange I use? Register on Bitunix with my link 👇
👉 https://www.bitunix.com/register?vipCode=EJGI6823
